title: Week 5 Hands On Activity Pipeline templates and Autogenerated pipelines
body:
INFS3822 – AI for Business Analytics

Week 5 Hands-On Activity – Template-based and Autogenerated pipelines Pre-requisites Please complete the following: • Week 5 Pre-Seminar Activities, available on Moodle, under Week 5 section. • Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Re-create a pipeline without autotuning.
